name: WESTAMERICA BANCORPORATION
summary: Westamerica Bancorporation (WABC) is a California-based bank holding company operating through its subsidiary Westamerica Bank. The company provides commercial banking products and services including loans, deposits, and investment securities primarily to consumers and businesses in California. Its operations focus on traditional banking services with emphasis on asset/liability management and maintaining credit quality across its loan and investment securities portfolios.
